name_en: BV New Mini Bag Top Tier Bottega Veneta New Concert Pouch. Small capacity, big potential. Fits a Pro Max phone. Adjustable strap for crossbody or shoulder wear. Super high cost-performance. The latest small bag for autumn and winter has a huge capacity. Tested to fit 4 short wallets, and even fits my fist. Cute and adorable with a capacity that is impressive. The strap length is adjustable, scoring full marks for daily commuting.

Model: 794258
Dimensions: 18.5*11.5*8.5cm
